item.title: Udemy Courses
item.description: List all Udemy courses Protocol Buffers 3, gRPC Complete Guide to Protocol Buffers 3 [Java, Golang, Python] gRPC [Java] Master Class: Build Modern API & Micro services Node.js The Complete Node.js Developer Course (3rd Edition)

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Greeting! This is an introduction post. This post tests the followings: Hero image is in the same directory as the post. This post should be at top of the sidebar. Post author should be the same as specified in author.yaml file.

item.title: Bash Variables
item.description: Variable NAME="John" echo $NAME echo "$NAME" echo "${NAME} Condition if [[ -z "$string" ]]; then echo "String is empty" elif [[ -n "$string" ]]; then echo "String is not empty" fi

item.title: Module System
item.description: Module System const fs = require('fs') const name = require('./utils.js') fs.writeFileSync('notes.txt', 'hello world!') console.log('Hi, ' + name) app.js console.log('utils.js') const name = 'Mike' module.exports = name utils.js
